3x3 PB Single 7.70

Scramble: x2 y B D2 F' D2 L2 F D2 L2 F L2 D F' R2 D2 L R F D' B' U (2018/7/23 19:42, Kunming)

Reconstruction Fail is more depressing than PB Fail. Even if I spent two hours, it did not work (Maybe misscramble?). The only thing I could remember for the white cross solve is that it has one F2L skip, OLL skip and U perm. This page gives some cool solves for this specific scramble.

复盘失败比PB失败还令人沮丧。我花了两小时复盘但没成功 (可能是因为打乱错了？)。只记得做的是白底十字，跳了一组F2L和OLL，PLL是U。本页给出一些有趣的解法。

x2 y B D2 F' D2 L2 F D2 L2 F L2 D F' R2 D2 L R F D' B' U

y' // inspection

D' F D L R' F // pseudo cross

U2' R U R' D' // XXcross

y U' R U2' R' y R U' R' // 3rd pair

y' R U' R' U' R U' R2' F R F' // 4th pair/OLS

R2 U R U R' U' R' U' R' U R' U' //ELL

B D2 F' D2 L2 F D2 L2 F L2 D F' R2 D2 L R F D' B' U

z2 y' //inspection

R F L2 F' L' D' R2 D2 //cross

y' R U' R' y U R U' R' //1st pair

U L' U L U' y L U' L' //2nd pair

U R U' R' U R' U' R //3rd pair

U F U R U' R' F' // setup

F' L' U' L F // OLS

x' R2 D2 R' U' R D2 R' U l' U2 // PLL

B D2 F' D2 L2 F D2 L2 F L2 D F' R2 D2 L R F D' B' U

z2 y' //inspection

R F L2 F' L' D' R2 D2 //cross

y' R U' R' y U R U' R' //1st pair

y2 R U' R' U2 y L' U' L //2nd pair

U R U' R' U y' R' U R //3rd pair

y' U2 R U' R' R' F R F' //4th pair

R U2' R2' U' R2 U' R2' U2 R // ZBLL

U //AUF

algs: x2 y B D2 F' D2 L2 F D2 L2 F L2 D F' R2 D2 L R F D' B' U
R2 U R U R' U' R' U' R' U R' U' //ELL
B D2 F' D2 L2 F D2 L2 F L2 D F' R2 D2 L R F D' B' U
